english: In my opinion, this restaurant is the best in the area.

arabic: مش ضَروري نِتِّفِق عَ كِلشي، بَس لازِم نِحتِرِم بَعض.
transliteration: Mish ḍarūri nittifiq ʕa kilshi, bas lāzim niḥtirim baʕḍ.
english: We don't have to agree on everything, but we need to respect each other.

arabic: أنا هيك بْفَكِّر، بَس ممكِن كون غَلطان.
transliteration: Ana hēk bfakkir, bas mumkin kūn ghalṭān.
english: That's what I think, but I could be wrong.

arabic: مبارِح صار معي شي كتير مُضحِك، خَلّيني خَبِّرَك.
transliteration: Mbāriḥ ṣār maʕī shi ktīr muḍḥik, khallīni khabbirak.
english: Yesterday something really funny happened to me, let me tell you.

arabic: وبَعدين تِصَوَّرو شو صار؟ ضَهَرَت إمّو مِن وَرا الباب!
transliteration: W-baʕdēn tiṣawwaru shū ṣār? Ḍahharit immo min wara il-bāb!
english: And then guess what happened? His mom appeared from behind the door!

arabic: شو رَأيَك نِطلَع عَ عَشا هالسَبت؟ في مَحَل جديد فَتَح بالجِمّيزة.
transliteration: Shū raʔyak niṭlaʕ ʕa ʕasha has-sabt? Fī maḥall jdīd fataḥ bil-Jmēze.
english: What do you think about going out to dinner this Saturday? A new place opened in Gemmayze.

arabic: خَلّيني شوف إذا في وَقت وبِرِدّ عليك بُكرا.
transliteration: Khallīni shūf iza fī waʔt w-bridd ʕalēk bukra.
english: Let me see if there's time and I'll get back to you tomorrow.

arabic: آلو؟ مين عم يِحكي؟ عَ مين بَدَّك تِحكي؟
transliteration: Ālo? Mīn ʕam yiḥki? ʕA mīn baddak tiḥki?
english: Hello? Who is speaking? Who do you want to talk to?

arabic: مَعلِش، بَعتِلّي رِسالة عَ الواتساب أحسَن.
english: It's fine, send me a message on WhatsApp instead.

arabic: بَدّي قَطِع هَلَّق، عم يِتصِلّو فيّي مِن الشُّغُل.
transliteration: Baddī ʔaṭṭiʕ hallaʔ, ʕam yittaṣṣalu fiyyī min ish-shughl.
english: I need to hang up now, they're calling me from work.
